message:
✨ Add progressive streaming to all compliance dashboard cards (#2578)

Convert Trivy, Kubescape, and Kyverno hooks from sequential cluster
iteration to parallel Promise.allSettled with progressive result
streaming. Each card now shows "Checking clusters... X/Y" as results
arrive. Also fixes Trestle card height shifting with min-height.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
